JSyn - Java Audio Synthesis

Unit Generators

  • Arithmetic: AddUnit, AddUnsignedUnit, MultiplyUnit, MultiplyUnsignedUnit, MultiplyAddUnit, MultiplyAddUnsignedUnit, SubtractUnit.
  • Logic: CompareUnit, SchmidtTrigger, MaximumUnit, MinimumUnit, LatchUnit, SelectUnit.
  • Control: ExponentialLag, EnvelopePlayer, ParabolicEnvelope.
  • Filters: Filter_1o1z, Filter_1o1p, StateVariableFilter.
  • Noise: WhiteNoise, RedNoise (interpolated).
  • Oscillators: SineOscillator, Impulse, Pulse, Sawtooth, Triangle, Table.
  • Miscellaneous: BusReader, BusWriter, DelayUnit, LineOut, WaveShaper.

    •
